nasb.text: But a lad did see them and told Absalom; so the two of them departed quickly and came to the house of a man in Bahurim, who had a well in his courtyard, and they went down into it.

esv.text: But a young man saw them and told Absalom. So both of them went away quickly and came to the house of a man at Bahurim, who had a well in his courtyard. And they went down into it.

cnv.text: 但有一個僕人看見他們，就去告訴押沙龍。因此，他們兩人急忙離開那裡，來到巴戶琳某人的家裡；那人的院子裡有一口井，他們就下到井裡。

ccb.text: 不料，有一个少年发现了他们，就去告诉押沙龙。他们二人急忙逃走，来到巴户琳的一户人家，藏到那家院子里的一口井内，
